prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style fighting attacks. Show only the effect element, with no character, arena, text, UI, watermark, or frame. Use a compact body-blow impact bloom with a bone-white hit flash, terracotta-red core, sandy dust fracture, and a few angular strike shards. Keep the shape tight, grounded, and readable in a game battle overlay. Preserve real impact structure but stylize the outline and color. Output a single isolated effect element on transparency. Important constraints: exactly 4 frames in one horizontal strip, no 2x2 grid, no extra projectile body, no beam, no fire, no lightning filaments.
